channel.title: Craft
channel.description: Craft is a list of hand oriented craft and technology Do we really need all those power tools?

item.title: French Polishing Myths
item.description:
Linen and more. Over the years, many articles have appeared in major woodworking magazines instructing readers to use linen for the outer cloth in a French polishing pad. No explanation,...

Source

![](https://media.popularwoodworking.com/app/uploads/2021/06/21102758/1112-fof-3-11_making_a_pad-1024x768.jpg)Linen and more. Over the years, many articles have appeared in major woodworking magazines instructing readers to use linen for the outer cloth in a French polishing pad. No explanation,...
[Source](https://www.popularwoodworking.com/finishing/french-polishing-myths/)

item.title: Registration is Open for London Classes
item.description: Chris and I are once again headed to London to teach classes with the London International Woodworking Festival at the end of October. Chris is teaching a four-day (Oct. 26-29) Irish Chair Class, and a short class (Oct. 30) on Peasant Carving, and I am (no surprise) teaching a four-day (Oct. 26-29) Dutch Tool Chest...
item.source:markdown: Chris and I are once again headed to London to teach classes with the London International Woodworking Festival at the end of October. Chris is teaching a four-day (Oct. 26-29) Irish Chair Class, and a short class (Oct. 30) on Peasant Carving, and I am (no surprise) teaching a four-day (Oct. 26-29) Dutch Tool Chest...

item.title: Trinket Box
item.description:
This box offers great box-building basics, but offers a fun twist with its whimsical legs, beveled top, and unique lift. This white oak and walnut box features finger joints and...

Source

![](https://media.popularwoodworking.com/app/uploads/2026/05/19120454/trinkeybox-1024x768.jpg)This box offers great box-building basics, but offers a fun twist with its whimsical legs, beveled top, and unique lift. This white oak and walnut box features finger joints and...
[Source](https://www.popularwoodworking.com/projects/trinket-box/)

item.title: Lego Workbenches
item.description: Last week, we received a treat of an email from Douglas Lambert, who recreated three workbenches from “Workbenches: From Design & Theory to Construction & Use” by Christopher Schwarz* in Lego form, and sent us detailed plans for each: “The Nicholson”  “Le Roubo” “Ye Knockdown Nicholson” You can download the plans for free at each...
item.source:markdown: Last week, we received a treat of an email from Douglas Lambert, who recreated three workbenches from “Workbenches: From Design & Theory to Construction & Use” by Christopher Schwarz\* in Lego form, and sent us detailed plans for each: “The Nicholson” “Le Roubo” “Ye Knockdown Nicholson” You can download the plans for free at each...

item.title: The Lefkowitz Shave Horse
item.description:
Making the shave horse accessible. Last year, Chair Maker and teacher Jeff Lefkowitz, a very good friend and mentor of mine, shared a project he had started to make the...

Source

Last year, Chair Maker and teacher Jeff Lefkowitz, a very good friend and mentor of mine, shared a project he had started to make the...
[Source](https://www.popularwoodworking.com/editors-blog/the-lefkowitz-shave-horse/)

item.title: LAP Storefront Closed on Memorial Day
item.description: The LAP editorial staff is happy to welcome to the Lost Art Press storefront (407 Madison Ave., Covington, Ky., 41011) from 10 a.m.-2 p.m. on most Mondays, Tuesdays, Wednesdays and Fridays. But a heads up that we will be closed on Monday, May 25, for Memorial Day.
item.source:markdown: The LAP editorial staff is happy to welcome to the Lost Art Press storefront (407 Madison Ave., Covington, Ky., 41011) from 10 a.m.-2 p.m. on most Mondays, Tuesdays, Wednesdays and Fridays. But a heads up that we will be closed on Monday, May 25, for Memorial Day.

item.title: Perfect Sharpening Angle Every Time
item.description:
Chisels and planes have bevel angles from 25 to 35 degrees depending on their intended use. You can buy a jig for grinding these angles, or make your own angle...

Source
item.source:markdown:
![](https://media.popularwoodworking.com/app/uploads/2026/05/19094643/oct00-right-angle-every-time-copy-1024x768.jpg)Chisels and planes have bevel angles from 25 to 35 degrees depending on their intended use. You can buy a jig for grinding these angles, or make your own angle...
[Source](https://www.popularwoodworking.com/tricks/perfect-sharpening-angle-every-time/)

item.title: Mind Upon Mind: Another Way to Use the Stanley No. 77 Doweling Machine
item.description: Editor’s note: Our Mind Upon Mind series is a nod to a 1937 Chips from the Chisel column (also featured in “Honest Labour: The Charles H. Hayward Years”), in which Hayward wrote, “The influence of mind upon mind is extraordinary.” The idea being there’s often room for improvement. To that end, we’ve asked you what else you have...
item.source:markdown: Editor’s note: Our Mind Upon Mind series is a nod to a 1937 Chips from the Chisel column (also featured in “Honest Labour: The Charles H. Hayward Years”), in which Hayward wrote, “The influence of mind upon mind is extraordinary.” The idea being there’s often room for improvement. To that end, we’ve asked you what else you have...

item.title: Knives Out
item.description:
The key to good woodworking is to keep all cutters and knives sharp. Also key? Don’t wreck them beyond repair. I held a whole-shop machine tuneup day recently. No work, just...

Hayward Years”), in which Hayward wrote, “The influence of mind upon mind is extraordinary.” The idea being there’s often room for improvement. To that end, we’ve asked you what else you have...

item.title: Clamp-Free Rip Fence
item.description:

item.title: ‘17th-century Essex County Cupboard’ Paint & Drawer-front Carving
item.description: Any moment now, we’re expecting an email that Peter Follansbee’s new book, “17th-Century Essex County Cupboard” will be arriving at the warehouse. So here’s an excerpt from Chapter 8, on decoration. – Fitz The cupboard’s decoration includes integral mouldings on some of the framing parts, applied mouldings on the door, panels, drawers and around both...
item.source:markdown: Any moment now, we’re expecting an email that Peter Follansbee’s new book, “17th-Century Essex County Cupboard” will be arriving at the warehouse. So here’s an excerpt from Chapter 8, on decoration. – Fitz The cupboard’s decoration includes integral mouldings on some of the framing parts, applied mouldings on the door, panels, drawers and around both...

item.title: For Sale: Kale’s Sawyer Windsor Settee
item.description: A year ago in the spring of ’25, while I, Kale, was still an apprentice, I ventured to Vermont to build a settee with George Sawyer at his workshop in Woodbury. This is the love child birthed from my time there. This settee takes inspiration from the “Rod Back Chair,” a chair originally designed by...
item.source:markdown: A year ago in the spring of ’25, while I, Kale, was still an apprentice, I ventured to Vermont to build a settee with George Sawyer at his workshop in Woodbury. This is the love child birthed from my time there. This settee takes inspiration from the “Rod Back Chair,” a chair originally designed by...

item.title: Anchors Away
item.description:
I’m a big proponent of anchoring tall furniture and cabinetry for the sake of safety, especially for children. In fact, I devoted a blog to the subject last year, and again just two...

Source

![](https://media.popularwoodworking.com/app/uploads/2026/05/06102922/ajblog-1248-image-copy-1024x624.jpg)I’m a big proponent of anchoring tall furniture and cabinetry for the sake of safety, especially for children. In fact, I devoted a blog to the subject last year, and again just two...
[Source](https://www.popularwoodworking.com/editors-blog/anchors-away/)

item.title: Breadboard End Joints
item.description:
Cut precision joints on a large top. Breadboard ends are old devices for improving a solid-wood top. They act like cleats to hold the top flat, which is particularly important...

Source

![](https://media.popularwoodworking.com/app/uploads/2021/06/07122602/tn_aw_13618_015-copy-1024x768.jpg)Cut precision joints on a large top. Breadboard ends are old devices for improving a solid-wood top. They act like cleats to hold the top flat, which is particularly important...
[Source](https://www.popularwoodworking.com/techniques/breadboard-end-joints/)

item.title: New Model Mandolin: 4
item.description:
The body of the mandolin is now together, so what’s next? In this video, I look at routing the rebate for the purflings and bindings. The purflings take quite a while to fit as there are tricky mitres to cut and the bindings (made from walnut) need to be bent on the bending iron to fit exactly. All good fun! Oh, and a bit about the fretboard too!

Cheers Gary
item.source:markdown:
The body of the mandolin is now together, so what’s next? In this video, I look at routing the rebate for the purflings and bindings. The purflings take quite a while to fit as there are tricky mitres to cut and the bindings (made from walnut) need to be bent on the bending iron to fit exactly. All good fun! Oh, and a bit about the fretboard too!
Cheers Gary
item.author: noreply@blogger.com (Gary Nava, Luthier)
